controls.title: Prompt Injection
controls.statement: Crafted input overrides the model's instructions, directly or through poisoned content it reads from RAG, files, or the web, to exfiltrate data, bypass safeguards, or trigger unintended tool actions.

controls.title: Sensitive Information Disclosure
controls.statement: The model exposes private, regulated, or proprietary data through outputs, logs, embeddings, or cached conversations.

controls.title: Supply Chain
controls.statement: Weaknesses in base models, datasets, libraries, plugins, or infrastructure compromise the whole application.

controls.title: Data and Model Poisoning
controls.statement: Tampered training, fine-tuning, or RAG data introduces bias, backdoors, or degraded behavior.

controls.title: Improper Output Handling
controls.statement: Model output passed downstream without validation enables injection, XSS, or code execution in connected systems.

controls.title: Excessive Agency
controls.statement: An agent granted too much autonomy, tooling, or permission can take damaging actions when manipulated.

controls.title: System Prompt Leakage
controls.statement: Sensitive information embedded in system prompts (rules, credentials, logic) is exposed to users.

controls.title: Vector and Embedding Weaknesses
controls.statement: RAG retrieval and embedding stores are manipulated or leak data via poisoned documents, embedding inversion, or cross-tenant retrieval.

controls.title: Misinformation
controls.statement: The model produces false or misleading output that users over-trust, leading to bad decisions and liability.

controls.title: Unbounded Consumption
controls.statement: Uncontrolled resource usage causes denial of service, runaway cost ('denial of wallet'), or model replication.
